title: AptonWorks
description: Designed and developed an 11-page website for AptonWorks — an AI Software Foundry specializing in enterprise-grade application development and AI-powered solutions.
longDescription:
Designed and developed the complete corporate website for AptonWorks, an AI-first Software Foundry that delivers enterprise-grade web, mobile, desktop, and cloud applications.

Built entirely in Framer, the site features a premium dark theme with striking blue-to-purple gradient effects, glassmorphic UI elements, and smooth scroll-triggered animations. The project spans 11 pages including the homepage, company page, Acorn AI product page, careers, contact, and a blog section with 5+ articles covering cloud infrastructure and AI topics — all crafted to position AptonWorks as a cutting-edge technology leader.
highlights: 11-page production website built entirely in Framer
Acorn AI product page with feature showcases
Blue-to-purple gradient system with glassmorphic UI
Fully responsive across all device breakpoints
Company & careers pages with team showcase
